tex:
50 students each choose their favourite colour from a list of six colours.
\newline
The results for the colours Red, Orange, Yellow, Green and Blue are shown in the tally chart.
\newline

Complete the tally chart.
\newline

\begin{tabular}{|l|l|}
\hline
Favourite colour & Tally \\
\hline
Red & IIII IIII I \\
\hline
Orange & IIII IIII IIII \\
\hline
Yellow & IIII IIII \\
\hline
Green & IIII \\
\hline
Blue & III \\
\hline
Purple & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
